summary.zh: F1 世界锦标赛在这十年诞生：阿尔法·罗密欧的增压 158/159 赛车统治开局，朱塞佩·法里纳成为首届世界冠军；1954—1955 年梅赛德斯携 W196 登场，带来燃油直喷与 Desmodromic（无回位弹簧）气门等创新，方吉奥借此与阿尔法、玛莎拉蒂时代合计五度问鼎；十年末库珀把发动机放到车手身后，中置引擎方案彻底改写了赛车设计的方向。
summary.en: F1's World Championship was born this decade: Alfa Romeo's supercharged 158/159 dominated the opening and Giuseppe Farina became the first world champion; in 1954–55 Mercedes arrived with the W196, bringing fuel injection and desmodromic valves as Juan Manuel Fangio amassed five titles; at the decade's end Cooper placed the engine behind the driver, and the mid-engine layout rewrote car design.
